name: Open Telemark Feather Ending
preceding_figure_names: Closed Impetus and Feather Finish,Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot,Feather Step,Hover Cross,Hover Feather,Natural Hover Telemark,Natural Telemark,Natural Twist Turn,Natural Zig-Zag from PP
following_figure_names: Three Step,Change Of Direction,Basic Weave (1-4 Reverse Turn to end BDW, check, and Basic Weave),Reverse Turn (1-4 Reverse Turn to end BLOD near corner, check and Basic Weave turning 1/8, 1/8, 3/4; or 1/4, 1/8, 3/4; to end DW of new LOD),Hover Telemark,Reverse Wave,Top Spin (check back after step 6),Outside Swivel (check back after step 6),Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot (at corner)
notes: This online reference gives a detailed description of the dance steps, including timing, footwork, alignment, and movement; steps diagram; a list of figures that may precede or follow the pattern; and videos providing instruction and demonstration of the figure, techniques and practice routines that include it.

steps.action: LF forward, feathered, start turn left
comments: Compress down through right shoulder, hip and foot. Use CBM to send lady to inside turn. Rise through LF leading heel turn.

steps.action: RF to side, backing diagonal wall
LF to side and slightly forward in PP, pointing diagonal wall
RF forward in PP and CBMP, pointing diagonal wall
RF forward in CBMP, OP, pointing diagonal wall
LF forward, facing diagonal wall, H
RF back, backing diagonal curve, start turn left
comments: Sway(S) CBM rise slightly e/o 1, NFR

steps.action: LF closes to RF (Heel Turn), LOD
RF diag fwd in PP, R side leading, pointing to LOD
LF fwd and across in PP and CBMP, pointing to LOD
RF to side and slightly back, backing wall
LF back in CBMP, backing diagonal wall
